response.justification: The candidate lacks any demonstrable C++ experience on Windows platforms, fixed income or capital markets domain expertise, and SQL Server/Oracle proficiency — all mandatory requirements. Their background is heavily focused on TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, and web/mobile systems, with no evidence of financial systems development or Windows-based C++ work.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience
Active contributor to open-source and community tech initiatives
Demonstrated DevOps and CI/CD practices across multiple projects
concerns: No evidence of C++ development on Windows platform
Lacks fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience
SQL experience listed generically without SQL Server or Oracle context
